Based on the information provided by agent1 about the relationship between lipid solubility and effectiveness for topical application, particularly emphasizing tetracaine's superior property in this regard, I concur that d-tetracaine would indeed have the highest potency among the options presented. One additional point supporting this view could be the historical precedent where tetracaine was widely recognized before other formulations became available; thus reinforcing its reputation as highly efficacious despite noted risks such as toxicity. Answer: D - Tetracaine. Your agreement aligns well with our earlier conclusions. Let me reiterate why we chose option D: Tetracaine.
